title: LoadedManifestData.java
description:
- This class holds information about the loaded manifest data, including the directories, the path of the intermediate cache of files to rename, and the number of files to be renamed.
- It provides a constructor to initialize the loaded manifest data, and getter methods to access the directories, file count, and entry sequence data.
- The class depends on the DirEntry, LoadManifestsStage, Path, and File classes.
